import os, sys, json, numpy as np, h5py, torch, cv2
os.environ["HF_HUB_OFFLINE"] = "1"

from lerobot.policies.pi0 import PI0Policy
from lerobot.policies.factory import make_pre_post_processors

device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")
policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained("lerobot/pi0_base").to(device).eval()
preprocess, postprocess = make_pre_post_processors(
    policy.config, "lerobot/pi0_base",
    preprocessor_overrides={"device_processor": {"device": str(device)}},
)

# 1) Config action feature stats
feat = policy.config.action_features["action"]
print("=== ActionFeature ===")
print("type:", type(feat))
for attr in ["shape", "mean", "std", "min", "max", "normalization_mode"]:
    if hasattr(feat, attr):
        print(f"{attr}:", getattr(feat, attr))

# 2) Training data action stats
h5_path = "/data/vlabench_train/train/task_000/episode_000000.hdf5"
with h5py.File(h5_path, "r") as f:
    actions = f["action"][:]
    print("\n=== Raw training actions ===")
    print("shape:", actions.shape)
    print("min :", actions.min(axis=0))
    print("max :", actions.max(axis=0))
    print("mean:", actions.mean(axis=0))
    print("std :", actions.std(axis=0))

    rgb = f["observation/rgb"][0]
    state = f["observation/state"][0]
    instruction = f["instruction"][()].decode("utf-8")

# 3) Build a single-frame batch (float images in [0,1])
img1 = cv2.resize(rgb[0], (224, 224))
img2 = cv2.resize(rgb[1], (224, 224))
img1_t = torch.from_numpy(img1).permute(2,0,1).unsqueeze(0).float() / 255.0
img2_t = torch.from_numpy(img2).permute(2,0,1).unsqueeze(0).float() / 255.0
state_t = torch.from_numpy(state).float().unsqueeze(0)
state_pad = torch.zeros(1, 32)
state_pad[:, :8] = state_t

batch = {
    "observation.images.base_0_rgb": img1_t.to(device),
    "observation.images.left_wrist_0_rgb": img2_t.to(device),
    "observation.images.right_wrist_0_rgb": img2_t.to(device),
    "observation.state": state_pad.to(device),
    "complementary_data": {"task": [instruction]},
}

pre = preprocess(batch)
print("\n=== Preprocessed observation.state ===")
print(pre["observation.state"][0, :10])

with torch.inference_mode():
    chunk = policy.predict_action_chunk(pre)
print("\n=== predict_action_chunk output ===")
print("shape:", chunk.shape)
print("first action (first 10 dims):", chunk[0, :10].cpu().numpy())
print("first action min/max:", chunk[0].min().item(), chunk[0].max().item())

with torch.inference_mode():
    sa = policy.select_action(pre)
print("\n=== select_action output ===")
print("shape:", sa.shape)
print("first 10 dims:", sa[0, :10].cpu().numpy())

# 4) Try postprocess on chunk
post = postprocess({"action": chunk.unsqueeze(1)})
print("\n=== postprocess output ===")
print("type:", type(post))
if hasattr(post, "action"):
    print("post.action shape:", post.action.shape)
    print("post.action first 10:", post.action[0, 0, :10].cpu().numpy() if isinstance(post.action, torch.Tensor) else post.action)
else:
    print("value:", post)
